summary: Frontend testing of Space Orbit educational app - All CRITICAL camera bug fixes VERIFIED. All new features tested and working correctly.

issues: THREE.Clock deprecation warning in console (non-blocking, cosmetic)

critical_code_review_comments: CameraControls completely rewritten (EarthScene.jsx lines 56-94) - one-shot animated transitions only, no continuous lerp that was causing snap-back
maxDistance increased from 30 to 80 in OrbitControls configuration (line 69)
createSatelliteGroup function creates 3D model with BoxGeometry body + solar panels (lines 140-151)
Hohmann transfer computation properly calculates transfer ellipse (Explore.jsx lines 70-79)
overlayOrbits and hohmannOrbits properly integrated into activeOrbits (line 141)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All camera bug fixes verified. Explore page camera controls no longer snap back after user interaction - tested with 6+ second waits. HEO zoom limit increased to 80, allowing full viewing of highly elliptical orbits. Satellite 3D model shows cross/plus shape (body + solar panels). Multi-orbit overlay works with Compare Orbits chips. Hohmann Transfer shows LEO→Transfer→GEO with labels.

test_results.CRITICAL_camera_snap_back_fix: PASS - Rotated scene, waited 6+ seconds, view angle REMAINED STABLE (tested twice)
test_results.CRITICAL_camera_zoom_persist: PASS - Zoomed out, waited 6+ seconds, zoom level REMAINED STABLE
test_results.CRITICAL_HEO_zoom_limit: PASS - maxDistance=80 allows viewing entire HEO orbit when zoomed out
test_results.compare_orbits_chips: PASS - LEO, GEO, HEO chips toggle overlay orbits alongside custom orbit
test_results.hohmann_transfer_visualization: PASS - Shows 3 orbits: LEO (green), Transfer (purple ellipse), GEO (gold) with labels
test_results.hohmann_hides_compare_section: PASS - Compare Orbits section hidden when Hohmann mode enabled
test_results.hohmann_disable_returns_normal: PASS - Disabling Hohmann returns to custom orbit view with Compare Orbits visible
test_results.sliders_real_time_update: PASS - Semi-Major Axis slider changed orbit size in real-time
test_results.presets_load_parameters: PASS - Molniya preset loaded correct params (6.80u, 0.74 ecc, 63.4° inc)
test_results.labels_toggle: PASS - Labels toggle shows/hides orbit labels in 3D scene
test_results.learn_page_orbit_switching: PASS - Clicking GEO/HEO in sidebar updates 3D scene and lesson content
test_results.home_page_3d_earth: PASS - 3D Earth with multiple colored orbits and animated satellites
test_results.satellite_3d_model: PASS - Satellite visible as cross/plus shape (body + solar panels) not just dot

camera_snap_back_issue.problem: Camera was snapping back to default view after user stopped interacting
camera_snap_back_issue.root_cause: Continuous camera.position.lerp() in useFrame was pulling camera back
camera_snap_back_issue.fix_applied: CameraControls rewritten with one-shot transitions only (lines 56-94)
camera_snap_back_issue.verification_method: Rotated/zoomed scene, waited 6-7 seconds, took screenshots - view remained stable

heo_zoom_limit_issue.problem: Could not zoom out far enough to see entire HEO orbit
heo_zoom_limit_issue.verification_method: Loaded HEO preset, zoomed out maximally, entire elliptical orbit visible

new_features_tested.satellite_3d_model: Implemented via createSatelliteGroup with BoxGeometry body + solar panels
new_features_tested.multi_orbit_overlay: Compare Orbits chips (LEO, GEO, HEO, etc) toggle overlay orbits
new_features_tested.hohmann_transfer: Shows LEO→Transfer ellipse→GEO visualization with labels
